## QA Checklist

### Coverage Requirements

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated for all new functionality
- [ ] Test coverage meets or exceeds 80% (statement, branch, function)
- [ ] Coverage report attached or linked in comments

### Performance Validation

- [ ] Performance benchmarks run for changes affecting critical paths
- [ ] No performance regressions detected (or justified if present)
- [ ] Memory usage profiled for data-intensive operations

### Evidence & Documentation

- [ ] All public APIs have JSDoc/TSDoc comments
- [ ] README updated if package interface changed
- [ ] Breaking changes documented in CHANGELOG
- [ ] Screenshots/recordings attached for UI changes

### CI Status

- [ ] All CI checks passing (lint, type-check, tests, build)
- [ ] No new warnings introduced
- [ ] Dependencies properly declared in package.json
